title: Expose port on running container
body:
/kind feature

Is it possible to expose a port from a running container with `podman`? I am not sure `docker` allows this.

The story - I started `db` in interactive mode, loaded dumps, configured it and forgot to expose port. Now I need to access it from outside, and I see no way to do this.

```
podman version 1.5.1
```

comments.body: Used `podman exec` with https://serveo.net for now.
one thing you could do is commit the container to an image and then rerun that image?
@baude even if I commit the state, only saved data will be preserved - all the processes inside will be restarted and memory contents will be lost, right?
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
@abitrolly The answer to your question was yes.
